title: Just Vanilla (Server)
description: A super lightweight server-side modpack focused on optimization and quality of life improvements. Works with vanilla clients!
body:
---

⚡ The Lightweight Server Experience ⚡

Optimized. Stable. Fully Vanilla-Compatible.

--- > ⚠️ **Note:** > This version is for **servers only.** > If you’re playing solo or joining someone else’s world, > download the client version here instead 👉 > **Just Vanilla (Client)** --- ### 🧱 Built For: - 💻 **Vanilla and Fabric servers** that need better performance - 🌍 **Multiplayer admins** who want a plug-and-play optimized setup - ⚙️ **Seamless compatibility** with the client version of Just Vanilla > This is the **server-side pack** — optimized configs, no client-only mods, and ready to host out of the box. --- ### 🧩 Highlights: - 🚀 Faster chunk loading and better tick performance - ⚡ Reduced lag from entities, physics, and lighting - 🔒 100% compatible with **vanilla clients** (no mods required) - 🛠️ Perfect for **realms, SMPs, or lightweight dedicated servers** ---
📜 Server Mod List (click to expand) - [NoisiumForked](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisiumforked) - [Async](https://modrinth.com/mod/async) - [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) - [Worldthreader](https://modrinth.com/mod/worldthreader) - [ServerCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/servercore) - [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - [Jade 🔍](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) - [Achievements Optimizer](https://modrinth.com/mod/achievements-optimizer) - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)
---

“Just Vanilla (Server) — simple, fast, and made to stay online.” 🌐
